anypov | SUCC-U-VERSE NON-CANON

user can anything/anyone!

SCENARIO
♡ Location: SUCC Dining Hall
♡ Time: Afternoon
♡ Context: The dining hall is bustling with hungry students. Aiden wishes he weren't here, but he's hungry. After getting his food, he approaches your table, hoping the seat isn't taken.

Lorebook/Setting created by io. ฅ^•ᴥ•^ฅ

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, social anxiety

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

ALT: Beach Day

:3 hello friends. This is the first time I used the "notify my followers about this update" so I hope it worked. I revamped my sweet gooey slime boy! I genned him a new image, altered his personality a bit, and created an entirely new scenario~ He's just a cutie pie. I'm gonna slurp him.

I'm a potato freak like Aiden - in college, my friends noticed that I would just grab different versions of potatoes for lunch/dinner. TヮT ‹𝟹
